2026-04-17T23:19:57.3603067Z ##[group]Run # Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3603606Z [36;1m# Generate a secure random API key (360 bits of entropy, 40+ chars)[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3604043Z [36;1m# Mask immediately to prevent timing vulnerabilities[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3604410Z [36;1mAPI_KEY=$(openssl rand -base64 45 | tr -d '/+=')[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3604730Z [36;1mecho "::add-mask::${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3604979Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3605152Z [36;1mPORT=3001[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3605346Z [36;1m[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3605524Z [36;1m# Set outputs for next steps[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3606053Z [36;1m{[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3606266Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_api_key=${API_KEY}"[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3606555Z [36;1m  echo "safe_outputs_port=${PORT}"[0m
2026-04-17T23:19:57.3606820Z [36;1m} >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"[0m

2026-04-17T23:22:23.4363044Z {"timestamp":"2026-04-17T23:20:58.094881558Z","direction":"IN","type":"RESPONSE","server_id":"github","payload":{"id":1,"jsonrpc":"2.0","result":{"content":[{"text":"{\"number\":58322,\"title\":\"[Storage] Docs: Document blob snapshot and version transfer support in Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs\",\"body\":\"## Documentation Gap\\n\\n**Package:** `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs`\\n**Service directory:** `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/`\\n**Triggered by:** commit [REDACTED] (PR #57368) by `@amnguye`\\n\\n## What Changed\\n\\nPR #57368 added two new properties to `BlobStorageResourceOptions`:\\n- **`Snapshot`** — specifies a snapshot identifier for transferring (copying, downloading, pause/resume) a blob snapshot as the source.\\n- **`VersionId`** — specifies a blob version identifier for transferring a specific blob version as the source.\\n\\nBoth properties are mutually exclusive (setting one while the other is set throws an error). They are only valid on source resources. The CHANGELOG entry in `12.4.0-beta.1` describes this feature, but the README has no corresponding examples.\\n\\nAdditionally, `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares` received the `Snapshot` property on `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions` in the same PR, but its README is also missing examples.\\n\\n## Gaps Found\\n\\n- `README.md` for `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs` has no examples showing how to use `BlobStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot` to copy or download a blob snapshot.\\n- `README.md` has no examples showing how to use `BlobStorageResourceOptions.VersionId` to copy or download a specific blob version.\\n- The \\u0026#34;Blob Copy\\u0026#34; and \\u0026#34;Download\\u0026#34; sections do not mention that snapshot or version identifiers can be set via `BlobStorageResourceOptions`, leaving users unaware of this capability.\\n- `README.md` for `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares` has no examples showing how to use `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions.Snapshot` to copy or download a file share snapshot.\\n\\n\\n\\u003cstrong\\u003e📐 Implementation Guide\\u003c/strong\\u003e\\n\\nThis section contains step-by-step instructions for a coding agent to implement the changes described above\\n\\n### Step 1: Modify files\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/README.md`\\nAction: Edit — add a new subsection under the existing **Blob Copy** section illustrating snapshot and version transfers.\\n\\nAfter the existing `s2sCopyBlob` snippet block, add:\\n\\n```markdown\\n#### Copy a Blob Snapshot\\n\\nSet `Snapshot` on `BlobStorageResourceOptions` to use a specific snapshot as the source.\\n\\n```\\nstring snapshotId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\nTransferOperation transferOperation = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n    sourceResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(\\n        sourceBlobUri,\\n        new BlockBlobStorageResourceOptions { Snapshot = snapshotId }),\\n    destinationResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(destinationBlobUri));\\nawait transferOperation.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n```\\n\\n#### Copy a Blob Version\\n\\nSet `VersionId` on `BlobStorageResourceOptions` to use a specific version as the source.\\n\\n```\\nstring versionId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\nTransferOperation transferOperation = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n    sourceResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(\\n        sourceBlobUri,\\n        new BlockBlobStorageResourceOptions { VersionId = versionId }),\\n    destinationResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(destinationBlobUri));\\nawait transferOperation.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n```\\n```\\n\\n**File:** `sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares/README.md`\\nAction: Edit — add a new subsection under the existing **File Copy** section illustrating snapshot transfers.\\n\\nAfter the existing `s2sCopyFile_Shares` snippet block, add:\\n\\n```markdown\\n#### Copy a Share File Snapshot\\n\\nSet `Snapshot` on `ShareFileStorageResourceOptions` to use a specific share snapshot as the source.\\n\\n```\\nstring snapshotId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\nTransferOperation fileTransfer = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n    sourceResource: await shares.FromFileAsync(\\n        sourceFileUri,\\n        new ShareFileStorageResourceOptions { Snapshot = snapshotId }),\\n    destinationResource: await shares.FromFileAsync(destinationFileUri));\\nawait fileTransfer.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n```\\n```\\n\\n### Step 2: Add or update code snippets\\n\\n**For `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs`:**\\n\\nCreate or extend a sample test file at:\\n`sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/tests/Samples/Sample_BlobSnapshotVersion.cs`\\n\\nThe file should contain two test methods with `#region` / `#endregion` snippet markers:\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.Storage.DataMovement;\\nusing Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample_BlobSnapshotVersion : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Requires live resources\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CopyBlobSnapshot()\\n        {\\n            string sourceBlobUri = TestEnvironment.StorageAccountBlobUri;\\n            string destinationBlobUri = TestEnvironment.StorageAccountBlobUri;\\n            TokenCredential tokenCredential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            BlobsStorageResourceProvider blobs = new(tokenCredential);\\n            TransferManager transferManager = new TransferManager(new TransferManagerOptions());\\n\\n            #region Snippet:s2sCopyBlobSnapshot\\n            string snapshotId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\n            TransferOperation transferOperation = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n                sourceResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(\\n                    new System.Uri(sourceBlobUri),\\n                    new BlockBlobStorageResourceOptions { Snapshot = snapshotId }),\\n                destinationResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(new System.Uri(destinationBlobUri)));\\n            await transferOperation.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Requires live resources\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CopyBlobVersion()\\n        {\\n            string sourceBlobUri = TestEnvironment.StorageAccountBlobUri;\\n            string destinationBlobUri = TestEnvironment.StorageAccountBlobUri;\\n            TokenCredential tokenCredential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            BlobsStorageResourceProvider blobs = new(tokenCredential);\\n            TransferManager transferManager = new TransferManager(new TransferManagerOptions());\\n\\n            #region Snippet:s2sCopyBlobVersion\\n            string versionId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\n            TransferOperation transferOperation = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n                sourceResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(\\n                    new System.Uri(sourceBlobUri),\\n                    new BlockBlobStorageResourceOptions { VersionId = versionId }),\\n                destinationResource: await blobs.FromBlobAsync(new System.Uri(destinationBlobUri)));\\n            await transferOperation.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\nFor each snippet, the README placeholder (to be replaced by `Update-Snippets.ps1`) is:\\n- `Snippet:s2sCopyBlobSnapshot` — insert after the `s2sCopyBlob` code block in the **Blob Copy** section\\n- `Snippet:s2sCopyBlobVersion` — insert after the `s2sCopyBlobSnapshot` block\\n\\n**For `Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares`:**\\n\\nCreate or extend a sample test file at:\\n`sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares/tests/Samples/Sample_ShareSnapshot.cs`\\n\\n```csharp\\n// Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation. All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.Storage.DataMovement;\\nusing Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares;\\nusing NUnit.Framework;\\n\\nnamespace Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Files.Shares.Tests.Samples\\n{\\n    public class Sample_ShareSnapshot : SamplesBase\\n    {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Requires live resources\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CopyFileSnapshot()\\n        {\\n            System.Uri sourceFileUri = new System.Uri(TestEnvironment.StorageAccountShareUri);\\n            System.Uri destinationFileUri = new System.Uri(TestEnvironment.StorageAccountShareUri);\\n            TokenCredential tokenCredential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ShareFilesStorageResourceProvider shares = new(tokenCredential);\\n            TransferManager transferManager = new TransferManager(new TransferManagerOptions());\\n\\n            #region Snippet:s2sCopyFileSnapshot_Shares\\n            string snapshotId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\n            TransferOperation fileTransfer = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n                sourceResource: await shares.FromFileAsync(\\n                    sourceFileUri,\\n                    new ShareFileStorageResourceOptions { Snapshot = snapshotId }),\\n                destinationResource: await shares.FromFileAsync(destinationFileUri));\\n            await fileTransfer.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nBoth READMEs already contain all required sections:\\n1. ✅ Getting started (Install the package, Prerequisites, Authenticate the client)\\n2. ✅ Key concepts\\n3. ✅ Examples — **needs the new snapshot/version subsections added**\\n4. ✅ Troubleshooting\\n5. ✅ Next steps\\n6. ✅ Contributing\\n\\nOnly the **Examples** section needs updates as described in Step 1 and Step 2.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build snippet code into README placeholders; verify with `git diff` that README was updated\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 storage` — not needed since no new public types were added (only properties on All rights reserved.\\n// Licensed under the MIT License.\\n\\nusing System.Threading.Tasks;\\nusing Azure.Core;\\nusing Azure.Identity;\\nusing Azure.Storage.DataMovement;\\nusing {\\n        [Test]\\n        [Ignore(\\u0026#34;Requires live resources\\u0026#34;)]\\n        public async Task CopyFileSnapshot()\\n        {\\n            System.Uri sourceFileUri = new System.Uri(TestEnvironment.StorageAccountShareUri);\\n            System.Uri destinationFileUri = new System.Uri(TestEnvironment.StorageAccountShareUri);\\n            TokenCredential tokenCredential = new DefaultAzureCredential();\\n            ShareFilesStorageResourceProvider shares = new(tokenCredential);\\n            TransferManager transferManager = new TransferManager(new TransferManagerOptions());\\n\\n            #region Snippet:s2sCopyFileSnapshot_Shares\\n            string snapshotId = \\u0026#34;2023-08-01T00:00:00.0000000Z\\u0026#34;;\\n            TransferOperation fileTransfer = await transferManager.StartTransferAsync(\\n                sourceResource: await shares.FromFileAsync(\\n                    sourceFileUri,\\n                    new ShareFileStorageResourceOptions { Snapshot = snapshotId }),\\n                destinationResource: await shares.FromFileAsync(destinationFileUri));\\n            await fileTransfer.WaitForCompletionAsync();\\n            #endregion\\n        }\\n    }\\n}\\n```\\n\\n### Step 3: Verify README structure\\n\\nBoth READMEs already contain all required sections:\\n1. ✅ Getting started (Install the package, Prerequisites, Authenticate the client)\\n2. ✅ Key concepts\\n3. ✅ Examples — **needs the new snapshot/version subsections added**\\n4. ✅ Troubleshooting\\n5. ✅ Next steps\\n6. ✅ Contributing\\n\\nOnly the **Examples** section needs updates as described in Step 1 and Step 2.\\n\\n### Step 4: Validate\\n\\nRun these commands in order:\\n\\n1. `dotnet build sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/`\\n2. `dotnet test sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/ --filter TestCategory!=Live`\\n3. `eng/scripts/Update-Snippets.ps1 storage` — injects snippet code into README placeholders; verify with `git diff` that README was updated\\n4. `eng/scripts/Export-API.ps1 storage` — not needed since no new public types were added (only properties on existing types, which were already exported in PR #57368)\\n5. `dotnet format sdk/storage/Azure.Storage.DataMovement.Blobs/`\\n\\nRepeat steps 1–3 and 5 for
